name: roblox-studio
description: Control Roblox Studio through Roblox's official built-in MCP server: read and edit Luau scripts, run code, insert assets, inspect the game tree, and drive playtests.

interface.shortDescription: Build, script, and playtest Roblox experiences with AI.
interface.longDescription: Drive your open Roblox Studio session through Roblox's official first-party MCP server (built into Studio — nothing extra to install). The agent can search and edit Luau scripts, execute code, search and insert Creator Store assets, generate meshes and materials, inspect and navigate the game tree, start and stop playtests, read console output, capture the viewport, and simulate player input. Supports multiple open Studio instances.
defaultPrompt: What's currently open in my Roblox Studio session?
Create a part that changes color when a player touches it.
Find and fix the bug in my leaderboard script.
Start a playtest and tell me what errors appear in the console.

companion.title: Enable the MCP server inside Roblox Studio
companion.summary: Roblox Studio ships its own MCP server — switch it on once, then keep Studio running while you chat.
prerequisites: Signed in to Studio with your Roblox account
steps: Open Roblox Studio and open any place (or create a new one).
Open the Assistant panel and click its … (More) menu → 'Manage MCP Servers'.
Toggle on 'Enable Studio as MCP server'.
Keep Studio running — Artyx connects automatically when you use Roblox tools (a green indicator in that panel shows connected clients).
